text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest—a festival where Umamusume fans
from all over gather at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Crowds of fans flock to catch a glimpse of Super
Creek and Tamamo Cross, two major contestants
butting heads at the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Creek! You and your trainer got a real
big weakness!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're not gonna be able to run well in the Tenno
Sho unless ya fix it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hah! You're not even a tiny bit scared, are ya?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, even if you say we've got a weakness, I
think we're the best duo there is!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We've overcome everything in our way to make it
this far.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know. You two really are somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But it's thinkin' you're the best that's your
weakness. Now, listen up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why do Umamusume run? Everyone's got their
own reasons, but y'know what?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We all got somethin' in common—there's
somethin' we all want.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Victory, glory, or just pure mastery... Everyone's
got some kinda goal...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But you two got nothin'! Why? 'Cause you were
already done when ya met.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Creek's happy spoilin' ya, and you're happy
bein' spoiled.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya both got whatcha want already, yeah? You
don't need nothin' else!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look at me though... I'm runnin' for my family.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
For my li'l bro and sis who can barely keep their
bellies full.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No way ya can run like me when you're already
satisfied! Whaddya got to run for?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is very convincing. I can't even
attempt to refute her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh... I had no idea. Then I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll cook for your little brother and sister too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's not the point! But whatever.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Those reasons aside, it'd be annoyin' if the ditzy
duo could do everythin', right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It don't bother me either way, but the fans hate a
Mary Sue, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Us? A ditzy duo?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Is that how people see us, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'm as surprised to hear it as you are.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What?! The two of ya are like a happily married
couple!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, everybody? Ya want 'em to sink,
right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! They're so sweet my teeth hurt just
thinking about them!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Knock 'em down a peg, Tamamo Cross!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cheers from the crowd seem to favor Tamamo
Cross.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heheh! If it's hungry versus lovey-dovey, then
hungry gets the respect.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You two already got everythin', so ya got no
future. Whatcha gonna do now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross shoulders the burden of her family.
Will we find an appropriate response to her by
the time the Tenno Sho rolls around?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: No way! This duo rocks!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I stan them both!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Say what now?! They've got more support than I
expected. They already got their cake! Y'all really
wanna watch 'em eat it too?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Su-per Creek! Su-per Creek! Su-per Creek!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, looks like ya got popularity on your side.
We'll see what they think after this race!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If you think your lovey-doveyness is enough to
beat a hunger-driven run like mine, then you're in
for a shock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Support from the fans for the two runners is split
right in half.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will we be able to find a way to overcome
Tamamo Cross's hunger-driven determination to
win by the time the Tenno Sho rolls around?
